extensions.name: uBlock Origin
extensions.description: Adblocker. The most effective ad and tracker blocker, essential for fast and clean browsing.

extensions.name: Bitwarden
extensions.description: Password manager. Seamless integration with my vault for auto-filling passwords everywhere.

extensions.name: ViolentMonkey
extensions.description: User scripts manager. Lets me customize websites with custom scripts and automations.

extensions.name: b2ntp
extensions.description: Kanban-style homepage with bookmarks. My organized new tab page with all important links.

extensions.name: Anytype Webclipper
extensions.description: Save pages and links directly to Anytype. Quick way to capture web content into my knowledge base.

extensions.name: NextNTP
extensions.description: Highly customizable mobile-friendly new tab page. My own creation for a beautiful mobile browsing experience.

extensions.name: Floatly
extensions.description: Custom shortcut actions from any page. Another project of mine for adding floating action buttons to mobile browsers.

extensions.name: MTI
extensions.description: Override website meta theme color. My extension to customize the Android browser theme color for any site.
